name: Mashed Turnips
recipeIngredient: 4 lbs yellow turnips (rutabagas), peeled and cut into 2-inch chunks
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
8 slices bacon, cooked crisp and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Butter a 13 x 11-inch gratin dish.
3. Place turnips in a pot and add enough water to cover. Bring to boiling over high heat.
4. Reduce heat and simmer until very tender, about 25 to 30 minutes.
5. Drain the turnips well and transfer them to a mixing bowl.
6. Beat the turnips with an electric mixer until fluffy but still retaining some texture.
7. Add butter and sour cream, and continue beating until combined.
8. Stir in caraway seeds and sugar, then season with salt and pepper.
9. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish.
10. Chop the bacon into small pieces and sprinkle over the top of the casserole.
11. Sprinkle lightly with paprika.
12. (The casserole can be stored in the refrigerator at this point. Warm to room temperature before baking.)
13. Bake until heated through, about 20 minutes. Serve hot. Makes 10 to 12 servings.
